---
title: "Religious Persistence"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    fig-align: center
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(magick)

cohorts_5yr = c(
  "1920","1925","1930","1935","1940","1945",
  "1950","1955","1960","1965","1970","1975","1980"
)

frames = lapply(cohorts_5yr, function(coh) {
  img = image_read(paste0("../output/figures/trans_", coh, "_5yr.png"))
  image_scale(img, "1200")
})

gif = image_animate(image_join(frames), fps = 1, optimize = TRUE)
image_write(gif, "../output/figures/trans_cohort_5yr_anim.gif")
```

## Transition Matrices

### Diachronic change

![](../output/figures/trans_cohort_5yr_anim.gif)

### By cohort

::: {.panel-tabset}

## 1920–1929
![](../output/figures/trans_1920_10yr.png)

## 1930–1939
![](../output/figures/trans_1930_10yr.png)

## 1940–1949
![](../output/figures/trans_1940_10yr.png)

## 1950–1959
![](../output/figures/trans_1950_10yr.png)

## 1960–1969
![](../output/figures/trans_1960_10yr.png)

## 1970–1979
![](../output/figures/trans_1970_10yr.png)

## 1980–1989
![](../output/figures/trans_1980_10yr.png)

:::

## Exchange and Structural Mobility

![](../output/figures/em_sm_10yr.png)

## Intergenerational Memory Curves

::: {.panel-tabset}

## 10-year cohorts
![](../output/figures/im_memory_10yr.png)

## 20-year cohorts
![](../output/figures/im_memory_20yr.png)

:::

## Regional Breakdowns

### Transition matrices

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Midwest
![](../output/figures/region/trans_grid_Midwest_20yr.png)

## Northeast
![](../output/figures/region/trans_grid_Northeast_20yr.png)

## South
![](../output/figures/region/trans_grid_South_20yr.png)

## West
![](../output/figures/region/trans_grid_West_20yr.png)

:::

### Mobility by region

![](../output/figures/region/mobility_region.png)
